summary: Iteration 6 testing completed successfully. All Community page features verified: stats display, tabs filtering (All/Experiences/Reviews), sort filter, posts list with pagination, create post modal with experience/review toggle, like toggle, comment functionality. Interview Round 2 SQL questions confirmed in system prompt.
seed_data_creation: 3 seed posts already existed (2 experiences + 1 review). Backend tests created additional TEST_ prefixed posts for testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Community page fully functional. Features tested: 1) GET /api/community/stats returns total, experiences, reviews, avg_rating. 2) GET /api/community/posts with pagination, type filter (experience/review), sort (newest/popular). 3) POST /api/community/posts creates experience or review posts. 4) POST /api/community/posts/{id}/like toggles like. 5) POST /api/community/posts/{id}/comment adds comment. 6) Frontend Community page at /community shows stats cards, tabs (All/Experiences/Reviews), sort dropdown, posts with like/comment buttons, create post modal with experience/review toggle. 7) Interview Round 2 system prompt includes SQL query questions.

community_stats_api.details: GET /api/community/stats returns {total, experiences, reviews, avg_rating}. Avg rating calculated from review posts.

community_posts_list_api.details: GET /api/community/posts returns paginated posts with author info and liked_by_me field. Supports type filter (experience/review) and sort (newest/popular).

community_create_post_api.details: POST /api/community/posts creates experience posts (with company, role, difficulty, result, tags) or review posts (with rating).

community_like_api.details: POST /api/community/posts/{id}/like toggles like status. Returns {liked: bool, likes_count: int}.

community_comment_api.details: POST /api/community/posts/{id}/comment adds comment. Returns comment with comment_id, author_name, content, created_at.

community_page_ui.details: Community page renders with: header, stats cards (Posts, Experiences, Reviews, Avg Rating), tabs (All/Experiences/Reviews), sort filter, Share button, posts list with like/comment buttons.

create_post_modal.details: Share button opens modal with experience/review toggle. Experience mode shows company, role, difficulty, result fields. Review mode shows star rating. Both have title, content, tags fields.

navbar_community_link.details: Navbar has Community link (data-testid='nav-community') that navigates to /community.

interview_round2_sql.details: ROUND_GUIDELINES[2] includes SQL query requirements: 'You MUST also ask SQL queries', example queries (second highest salary, JOINs, GROUP BY HAVING, self-join), 'Ask at least 1-2 SQL questions'.

test_classes: TestCommunityStats (4 tests) - stats endpoint returns 200, has required fields, values are numbers, requires auth
TestCommunityPostsList (8 tests) - list returns 200, has pagination, filter by experience/review, sort by newest/popular, has author info, has liked_by_me
TestCommunityPostCreate (4 tests) - create experience post, create review with rating, requires auth, created post appears in list
TestCommunityLike (3 tests) - like toggle on, like toggle off, like nonexistent post returns 404
TestCommunityComment (3 tests) - add comment, comment appears in post, comment nonexistent post returns 404
TestInterviewRound2SQL (1 test) - round 2 guidelines include SQL queries
TestAuthRequired (5 tests) - all community endpoints require authentication
